name: git-practices
description: Strict git practices for safe development workflow
author: opencode

templates.feat:
feat: <description>

- What this feature does
- How it works
- Any important notes
templates.fix:
fix: <description>

- What was broken
- How it's fixed
- Testing notes
templates.docs:
docs: <description>

- What was added/updated
- Location of changes
- Related documentation
templates.test:
test: <description>

- What tests were added
- Coverage areas
- Test commands
templates.refactor:
refactor: <description>

- What was refactored
- Why it was needed
- No functional changes
templates.chore:
chore: <description>

- What maintenance task
- Why it's needed
- Any side effects
